vol_description: This volume stores task-by-task subsets of DBN data collection in Peru. This includes data from the Child Protocol, Parent Protocol, and Religious Landscape Survey. These data and the volume are to be kept PRIVATE!

This volume stores task-by-task subsets of DBN data collection in Uganda. This includes data from the Child Protocol, Parent Protocol, and Religious Landscape Survey. These data and the volume are to be kept PRIVATE!
